title: The Day Holds Its Breath

mood.label: Uneasy calm
mood.summary: A watchful day balanced on a knife's edge — a paper-thin U.S.–Iran ceasefire and climate alarms pull down while tentative Hormuz talks, record markets, and a run of public-health and science wins pull up, leaving real danger and real hope with no resolution yet.

pattern: stack(s("bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~, ~ hh ~ hh ~ hh ~ hh, ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ cp ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.7), note("<[a3,c4,e4,g4] [d3,f#3,a3,c4] [e3,g3,b3,d4] [g3,b3,d4,f#4]>").s("sawtooth").attack(0.6).decay(0.3).sustain(0.7).release(2.2).lpf(2200).gain(0.3).room(0.42).rsize(3), note("a2 a2 e2 g2 d2 d2 a2 c3 e2 e2 b2 d3 g2 g2 d2 f#2").s("square").lpf(800).attack(0.02).decay(0.2).sustain(0.4).release(0.4).gain(0.45), note("e4 ~ g4 a4 ~ b4 a4 ~ f#4 ~ a4 ~ f#4 e4 ~ d4 e4 ~ g4 b4 ~ a4 g4 ~ f#4 ~ d4 e4 ~ f#4 ~ ~").s("triangle").attack(0.01).decay(0.2).sustain(0.3).release(0.6).lpf(3000).gain(0.55).delay(0.3).delaytime(0.375).room(0.3))

lines: Four hundred names the wire won't stop counting,
Gaza under orders, Beirut under thunder —
the strait still holds, if hope still breathes.
Algeria wakes to eyes that can see,
the Nikkei climbs to a number like a prayer.
In a lab the light is learning to think,
while the heat keeps rising everywhere.
So we hold the day like a glass too full —
real danger, real morning, no answer yet.
Cloud on the water, sun on the rail,
caught between the siren and the sunset.
